mapper.sql: sbpi.id, sbpi.group_id, sbpi.bonus_name, sbpi.employee_id, sbpi.work_card, sbpi.employee_name, sbpi.bank_account, sbpi.bank_name, sbpi.payable_amount, sbpi.amount_pre_tax, sbpi.deduct_income_tax, sbpi.amount_after_tax, sbpi.operation_code, sbpi.error_msg, sbpi.data_status, sbpi.create_time, sbpi.create_by, sbpi.update_time, sbpi.update_by, sbpi.bonus_id,sbpi.entry_time,sbpi.department,sbpi.administrative_office,sbpi.cost_center,sbpi.cost_center_num,sbpi.service_department

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.group_id as ${tAlias}_group_id, ${tAlias}.bonus_name as ${tAlias}_bonus_name, ${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_employee_id, ${tAlias}.work_card as ${tAlias}_work_card, ${tAlias}.employee_name as ${tAlias}_employee_name, ${tAlias}.bank_account as ${tAlias}_bank_account, ${tAlias}.bank_name as ${tAlias}_bank_name, ${tAlias}.payable_amount as ${tAlias}_payable_amount, ${tAlias}.amount_pre_tax as ${tAlias}_amount_pre_tax, ${tAlias}.deduct_income_tax as ${tAlias}_deduct_income_tax, ${tAlias}.amount_after_tax as ${tAlias}_amount_after_tax, ${tAlias}.operation_code as ${tAlias}_operation_code, ${tAlias}.error_msg as ${tAlias}_error_msg, ${tAlias}.data_status as ${tAlias}_data_status, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by,${tAlias}.bonus_id as ${tAlias}_bonus_id
mapper.insert: insert into swm_bonus_payment_interface (group_id, bonus_name, employee_id, work_card, employee_name, bank_account, bank_name, payable_amount, amount_pre_tax, deduct_income_tax, amount_after_tax, operation_code, error_msg, data_status, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, bonus_id) values (#{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{bonusName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{employeeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bankAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bankName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{payableAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amountPreTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{deductIncomeTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amountAfterTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{operationCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataStatus,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{bonusId, jdbcType = BIGINT})
mapper.update: update swm_bonus_payment_interface set group_id = #{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, bonus_name = #{bonusName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, employee_id = #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, work_card = #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, employee_name = #{employeeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bank_account = #{bankAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bank_name = #{bankName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, payable_amount = #{payableAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, amount_pre_tax = #{amountPreTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, deduct_income_tax = #{deductIncomeTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, amount_after_tax = #{amountAfterTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, operation_code = #{operationCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, error_msg = #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, data_status = #{dataStatus,jdbcType=CHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, bonus_id = #{bonusId, jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: WITH cte AS (SELECT #{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT} group_id, #{bonusName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} bonus_name, #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT} employee_id, #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR} work_card, #{employeeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} employee_name, #{bankAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR} bank_account, #{bankName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} bank_name, #{payableAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL} payable_amount, #{amountPreTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL} amount_pre_tax, #{deductIncomeTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL} deduct_income_tax, #{amountAfterTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL} amount_after_tax, #{operationCode,jdbcType=CHAR} operation_code, #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR} error_msg, #{dataStatus,jdbcType=CHAR} data_status, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} create_time, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} create_by, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} update_time, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} update_by, #{bonusId, jdbcType = BIGINT} bonus_id, #{costCenter,jdbcType=VARCHAR} cost_center,#{costCenterNum,jdbcType=BIGINT} cost_center_num,#{entryTime,jdbcType=DATE} entry_time, #{department,jdbcType=VARCHAR} department,#{administrativeOffice,jdbcType=VARCHAR} administrative_office,#{serviceDepartment,jdbcType=VARCHAR} service_department ) insert into swm_bonus_payment_interface(group_id, bonus_name, employee_id, work_card, employee_name, bank_account, bank_name, payable_amount, amount_pre_tax, deduct_income_tax, amount_after_tax, operation_code,error_msg, data_status, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by,bonus_id,cost_center,cost_center_num,entry_time,department,administrative_office,service_department) select cte.group_id,cte.bonus_name,isnull(se.employee_id,-1),right(replicate('0',6) + convert(varchar(6),cte.work_card),6) ,cte.employee_name, isnull(cte.bank_account,se.bank_account), isnull(cte.bank_name,se.bank_name),cte.payable_amount,cte.amount_pre_tax,cte.deduct_income_tax,cte.amount_after_tax,cte.operation_code, case when isnull(cte.bank_account,isnull(se.bank_account,'@#$%^&*'))='@#$%^&*' then '此人无银行账号' when isnull(cte.cost_center_num,isnull(se.cost_center_num,-1))=-1 then '此人无成本中心号' ELSE '' END, case when isnull(cte.bank_account,isnull(se.bank_account,'@#$%^&*'))='@#$%^&*' then 'F' when isnull(cte.cost_center_num,isnull(se.cost_center_num,-1))=-1 then 'F' ELSE 'T' END, getDate(), cte.create_by, getDate(), cte.update_by,cte.bonus_id, isnull(cte.cost_center,se.cost_center),isnull(cte.cost_center_num,se.cost_center_num), isnull(cte.entry_time,se.entry_time),isnull(cte.department,se.department), isnull(cte.administrative_office,se.administrative_office),isnull(cte.service_department,se.service_department) from cte left join swm_employee se on RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( se.work_card ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim(cte.work_card) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) AND se.name =cte.employee_name AND se.work_flag = 1
mapper.select: select case when exists (select 1 from swm_bonus_payment where bonus_id = #{bonusId, jdbcType = BIGINT} and enabled_flag=1 and work_card = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) ) then 1 else 0 end
